agent_roster.content:
Full agent team for GeniusGTX content operation:
- Jordan: Hook writer (active Slack bot) — writes scroll-stopping hooks for X/Twitter
- Maya: Thread/body writer (active Slack bot) — writes full posts with format-specific rules
- Kai: Researcher & ideation agent — runs Daily Research (5:30am), Twitter Monitor (6x/day), Timeline Scroll (3x/day), YouTube Monitor (2x/day). Fills the idea pipeline from 3 input funnels.
- Ellis: Account manager / scheduling agent — handles posting cadence, scheduling, content calendar, pipeline cleanup and publishing. Role defined by Toản on 2026-04-01.
